## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new/changed logic
- [ ] ADR included if introducing new architectural patterns, cross-cutting concerns, or third-party dependencies
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or sensitive data committed
- [ ] Commit messages are imperative, present tense
